basic_details.short_information: Maharishi Valmiki Hospital (MVH) Junior Resident (MBBS) Notification 2026 has been released for the recruitment of Junior Resident (MBBS) posts at MVH. A total of 4 vacancies have been announced through the MVH Junior Resident (MBBS) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years Age Relaxation: 35 years for SC/ST and 33 years for OBC candidates.

qualification.details: MBBS from a recognized university. Must have completed one year internship not before 2 years as on date of interview. Enrolled with Delhi Medical Council. The candidate must not have completed 01 years Junior Residency in any Govt. hospital in India.

salary_details.details: Pay Matrix 10 of 7th CPC with basic of Rs. 56,100/- per month plus other allowances as admissible.

all_official_links.label: Download MVH Junior Resident (MBBS) Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for MVH Junior Resident (MBBS) posts?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Junior Resident (MBBS) posts at Maharishi Valmiki Hospital is scheduled for 22 June 2026. Candidates should ensure they attend on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies for Junior Resident (MBBS) at MVH?
faq.answer: Maharishi Valmiki Hospital is recruiting for a total of 4 vacancies for the Junior Resident (MBBS) position through this walk-in interview.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Resident (MBBS) post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MBBS degree from a recognized university and have completed their one-year internship not more than two years prior to the interview date. Enrollment with the Delhi Medical Council is also mandatory.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Junior Resident (MBBS) position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Junior Resident (MBBS) post is 30 years. Age relaxation is provided for SC/ST and OBC categories.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for the MVH Junior Resident (MBBS) recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the Junior Resident (MBBS) posts at Maharishi Valmiki Hospital.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Junior Resident (MBBS) post?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Junior Resident (MBBS) position will receive a salary of Rs. 56,100 per month, as per Pay Matrix 10 of the 7th CPC, along with other admissible allowances.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the MVH Junior Resident (MBBS) recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Junior Resident (MBBS) posts at Maharishi Valmiki Hospital involves a Walk-in Interview followed by Document Verification.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the walk-in interview for the MVH Junior Resident (MBBS) posts going to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at the Maharishi Valmiki Hospital (MVH) office. Specific details regarding the exact venue and reporting time should be confirmed from the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, internship completion certificate, Delhi Medical Council registration, and category certificates (if applicable), along with one set of self-attested photocopies.

faq.question: Q10. Can candidates who have completed Junior Residency in other government hospitals apply?
faq.answer: No, candidates who have already completed one year of Junior Residency in any Government hospital in India are not eligible to apply for this position.

faq.question: What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for MVH Junior Resident (MBBS) posts?
